leadText: The Devon Parts (Japanese: デボンのにもつ Devon Bag) are a Key Item introduced in Generation III. In Pokémon Ruby, Sapphire, and Emerald, they were known as the Devon Goods.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Devon Parts are stolen by a Team Magma Grunt R OR / Team Aqua Grunt S E AS in Rustboro City after the player has earned the Stone Badge . After the player has gotten the parts back, Mr. Stone requests that they deliver the goods to Captain Stern themselves. The attaché case contains mechanical parts from the Devon Corporation . Giving the parts to Stern in the Oceanic Museum progresses the main storyline.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description R S E A package that contains Devon 's machine parts. FR LG A package that contains mechanical parts of some sort made by the Devon Corporation . OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A case that contains mechanical parts of some sort made by the Devon Corporation.
